narrative:
36 Ohio House district has 81,023 registered voters, with 59.2% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 21.0% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 19.8%, a narrow Republican lean of 1.2 percentage points. Registration is trending bluer in younger age cohorts (1990s–2000s births lean +2.5% D−R vs -7.8% for 1950s–60s cohorts).
